task.name: Check BMAD Compatibility
task.description: Evaluates a new BMAD release against RBTV touchpoints and produces a compatibility report
task.objective: Systematically evaluate whether a new BMAD release is compatible with RBTV by checking every declared touchpoint in bmad-compat.yaml. Produce a compatibility report that tells the user whether it is safe to update, what breaks, and what needs to change in RBTV before updating.

llm.rule: Read bmad-compat.yaml completely before checking any touchpoints.
Check EVERY touchpoint — do not skip any category.
Distinguish clearly between: Compatible, Breaking, and Unknown (cannot verify).
Do not modify any RBTV or BMAD files during this task — evaluation only.
If the BMAD mirror has not been updated to the target version, use release notes and GitHub as secondary verification source.
Save the compatibility report to the output path before presenting the summary.

inputs.input: The BMAD version to evaluate compatibility against (e.g., "6.0.0-Beta.5"). User must provide this.
URL to the BMAD release notes or GitHub release page for the target version. Helps when mirror is not yet updated.

check.action: Ask the user: "Which BMAD version do you want to evaluate? (e.g., 6.0.0-Beta.5)"

substep.title: Read Compatibility Manifest
substep.action: Read {rbtv_path}/bmad-compat.yaml — this is the authoritative list of touchpoints to verify.
Note current bmad_target_version and bmad_min_version from the manifest.

substep.title: Determine Verification Method
substep.action: Read {bmad_install_path}/_config/manifest.yaml to find the currently installed BMAD version.

check.action: Primary method: check file existence and structure directly in the BMAD installation.

check.if: installed BMAD version does not match target_bmad_version
check.action: Secondary method: use release notes, GitHub release content, and changelog to identify structural changes.
Note in report that direct file verification was not possible — mirror must be updated for full validation.

substep.title: Verify Config File Paths and Fields
substep.action: For each installer_writes touchpoint in bmad-compat.yaml: verify the target path exists in the BMAD project at {project-root}/{path}.
For paths with field_used or fields_used: verify those YAML fields exist in the file.
For bmad-help.csv: verify the CSV header row matches the expected column schema in structure_assumptions.
Record result for each: Compatible | Breaking | Unknown.

substep.title: Verify BMAD Workflow Paths
substep.action: For each agent_references touchpoint: verify the file exists at {project-root}/{path}.
If file does not exist: check whether the workflow was renamed, split, or moved in the target BMAD version.
Record result for each: Compatible | Breaking (with new path if known) | Unknown.

substep.title: Verify BMAD Task and Workflow Files
substep.action: For each task_references touchpoint: verify the file exists at {project-root}/{path}.
For files using {variable} references: verify the variable name and file path are still valid.
Record result for each: Compatible | Breaking | Unknown.

substep.title: Verify Structural Assumptions
substep.action: For each structure_assumptions item: verify the assumption holds in the target BMAD version.
For bmad-help.csv: compare expected column schema against actual header row.
For manifest.yaml: verify installation.version field path is intact.
For config.yaml files: verify expected YAML field names still exist.
Record result for each: Compatible | Breaking | Unknown.

check.action: Overall verdict: COMPATIBLE — safe to update BMAD.
Overall verdict: BREAKING CHANGES — RBTV must be updated before BMAD upgrade.

check.if: no Breaking touchpoints but some Unknown
check.action: Overall verdict: PARTIALLY VERIFIED — manual review needed for Unknown items before upgrading.

substep.title: Write Report File
substep.action: Load report template from {rbtv_path}/tasks/data/bmad-compat-report-template.md
Fill in: evaluation date, RBTV version, current BMAD version, target BMAD version, overall verdict, touchpoint results table, recommended actions.
Save report to: {project-root}/_admin-output/planning-artifacts/bmad-compat-report-{target_bmad_version}.md

substep.title: Present Summary
substep.action: Present: overall verdict, count of Compatible/Breaking/Unknown touchpoints, list of Breaking items with recommended RBTV fixes, path to saved report.

check.action: Recommend: Update BMAD via CLI, then re-run RBTV installer, then update bmad_target_version in bmad-compat.yaml and _config/config.yaml.
For each Breaking touchpoint: describe the specific RBTV change needed (file path update, field rename, new format).
Recommend: Fix RBTV touchpoints first, then update BMAD, then re-run installer.
List Unknown items and suggest manual verification steps (update mirror, inspect files directly).

halt-conditions.condition: Target BMAD version not provided — request before proceeding.
bmad-compat.yaml not found — cannot proceed without touchpoints manifest.
